sentences.arabic: جَلَسَتِ الأُمُّ مَعَ أَطْفَالِهَا وَشَرَحَتْ لَهُمْ أَهَمِّيَّةَ الاِدِّخَارِ.
sentences.translation: Majka je sjela s djecom i objasnila im važnost štednje.
sentences.translationEn: The mother sat with her children and explained the importance of saving.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتْ: مَنْ يَدَّخِرُ يَسْتَطِيعُ أَنْ يَشْتَرِيَ مَا يُرِيدُ.
sentences.translation: Rekla je: Ko štedi može kupiti što želi.
sentences.translationEn: She said: Whoever saves can buy what they want.

sentences.arabic: اشْتَرَتْ لِكُلِّ طِفْلٍ كُوزَ خَزٍّ صَغِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Kupila je svakom djetetu malu kasicu.
sentences.translationEn: She bought each child a small piggy bank.

sentences.arabic: بَدَأَ الأَطْفَالُ يَضَعُونَ نُقُودَهُمْ فِيهَا كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Djeca su počela stavljati novac u njih svaki dan.
sentences.translationEn: The children began putting their money in them every day.
